grades.rationale: Best current contextual placement, but still stylized, low facial fidelity, and procedural actor posture.
Rigged structural pass, but visual material/wardrobe and bedside alignment are weaker than Anny fallback.
Strong structural gate with clothing and face review cues, but orientation/silhouette still reads as technical comparator rather than realistic patient.
Best structural CharMorph candidate with lower vertex count and more animation/morph evidence, but WebXR screenshot still needs target-facing pose and believable bedside clothing integration.

nextActions: Introduce a case-defined patient facing target/orientation contract in the encounter factory rather than source-specific rotations.
Render patient close-up/mouth-gaze screenshots per candidate before promotion.
Use Reom as next structural source candidate because it has strongest local gate and smaller mesh budget.
